responsive_tree_output.summary: Create a tablet/mobile tree because the responsive mockup uses a materially different composition.

display_rules.reason: Desktop composition is not used in responsive variant route.
Responsive variant is active on tablet and mobile.

display_contract.content_policy: Meaningful content is preserved through the viewport variant tree.
display_contract.sync_policy: Repeated content must be synced manually or through shared dynamic data.

steps.action: Create the responsive variant tree from the mobile mockup.
steps.expected_result: Mobile composition is represented as its own viewport tree.

required_checks: Confirm desktop section is not visible on mobile.
Confirm mobile variant is not visible on desktop.
Confirm duplicated content has a sync policy.
validation_plan.claim_boundary: This is a viewport tree handoff plan, not export or accessibility validation.

final_review.reason: Viewport tree route includes display and sync policies.

unresolved_unknowns: Confirm whether tablet should share the mobile variant or receive its own tree.
